texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: The above Rates are based on per person in a room
texts.text: The above Rates are based on per person in a room

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Only green or earth colors 4X4 Land Cruisers or Land Rovers vehicles are acceptable Mara North Conservancy.
texts.text: Only green or earth colors 4X4 Land Cruisers or Land Rovers vehicles are acceptable Mara North Conservancy.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Welcome cocktail, breakfast, lunch and dinner, afternoon tea, cookies, early morning tea/coffee/hot chocolate Two airstrip transfers, two shared day game drives daily in Mara North Conservancy
texts.text: Welcome cocktail, breakfast, lunch and dinner, afternoon tea, cookies, early morning tea/coffee/hot chocolate Two airstrip transfers, two shared day game drives daily in Mara North Conservancy

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Welcome cocktail, breakfast, lunch and dinner, afternoon tea, cookies, early morning tea/coffee/hot chocolate Two airstrip transfers, two shared day game drives daily in Mara North Conservancy and one night game drive in Mara North Conservancy Laundry, one sundowner, one bush meal, one eco walk Tea, coffee, snacks, soft drinks, local beer and house wine Cocktails and spirits are served after 18:00.
texts.text: Welcome cocktail, breakfast, lunch and dinner, afternoon tea, cookies, early morning tea/coffee/hot chocolate Two airstrip transfers, two shared day game drives daily in Mara North Conservancy and one night game drive in Mara North Conservancy Laundry, one sundowner, one bush meal, one eco walk Tea, coffee, snacks, soft drinks, local beer and house wine Cocktails and spirits are served after 18:00.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Mara North conservancy fee : $130 Per Adult per night and  $65 per child per night for Non Residents Mara North conservancy fee : Ksh. 3,000 Per Adult per night and  Ksh. 1,500 per child per night for Residents Maasai Mara National Reserve Park entry fees, exclusive use of vehicles and temporary Flying Doctors evacuation cover Extra activities such as Balloon Safari, massage and spa, charged  phone calls and any payable extra service Personal insurance, domestic flights, gratuity and other statutory increases
texts.text: Mara North conservancy fee : $130 Per Adult per night and  $65 per child per night for Non Residents Mara North conservancy fee : Ksh. 3,000 Per Adult per night and  Ksh. 1,500 per child per night for Residents Maasai Mara National Reserve Park entry fees, exclusive use of vehicles and temporary Flying Doctors evacuation cover Extra activities such as Balloon Safari, massage and spa, charged  phone calls and any payable extra service Personal insurance, domestic flights, gratuity and other statutory increases

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Rates include all taxes. Royal Mara additional room supplement of US$ 100 will apply on Easter Holiday and December 24th, 25th, 26th,  31st & January 1st 2026 plus 2
texts.text: Rates include all taxes. Royal Mara additional room supplement of US$ 100 will apply on Easter Holiday and December 24th, 25th, 26th,  31st & January 1st 2026 plus 2

texts.label: text
texts.orig: nights minimum stay over Easter and Christmas / New Year. All reservations must be prepaid in full at least 30 days and 60 days in peak season prior to the guest's arrival.
texts.text: nights minimum stay over Easter and Christmas / New Year. All reservations must be prepaid in full at least 30 days and 60 days in peak season prior to the guest's arrival.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Raiply Building, Ground Floor.   P.O. Box 9922 GPO Nairobi Kenya,    Tel: +254 (0)705 333 333 EMAIL: reservations@royalmara.com,    www.royalmara.com
texts.text: Raiply Building, Ground Floor.   P.O. Box 9922 GPO Nairobi Kenya,    Tel: +254 (0)705 333 333 EMAIL: reservations@royalmara.com,    www.royalmara.com

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Upon confirmation of a booking 50% deposit must be paid to secure the booking within 7 days. At least 60 days prior to arrival the remaining payment must be cleared. In the event that full payment is not received within the specified time, Royal Mara may at its discretion terminate this agreement forthwith and thereafter shall have no obligation to provide service(s) to the clients. Block bookings confirmed and a deposit of 50% not paid within 14 days will automatically be released. The final payment should be cleared at least 60 days prior to clients' arrival at camp. Management reserves the right to accept block bookings. Group policy: For every 15 full paying clients, the 16th person sharing in a twin stays on complimentary basis. Please note however, that we will invoice the client for conservancy fees which is payable per night. Not more that three (3) single rooms can be held per block booking or group booking. Four (4) singles and above will be charged at double room rate Tour leaders or guides will be charged USD 150 and they will be accommodated in guide accommodation however subject to availability guest tents may be provided at the discretion of Royal Mara if such space is available. Driver and Vehicle: Driver's Accommodation Kes. 3,000, / Driver's Conservancy Fees Kes 3,000, /  Vehicle Entry Kes. 3000 Check-in: 12:00 PM and Check-out: 10:00AM Cancellation And No Show; will only be accepted when made in writing and acknowledged from our Reservations office. Reservations that are cancelled, reduced in length of stay or reduced in numbers (hereinafter collectively called a CANCELLATION) are subject to Cancellation and No show fees as follows: 0 - 15 Days   100% 16- 30 Days   50% 31 - 45 Days  25% Children: Children 12 years and above are considered adults. Children between 3 and 11 years will pay 75% on the Ground Package rate. Children under the age of 3 years sharing a room with an adult will be accommodated on complimentary basis (maximum 2) All vouchers issued and bookings made by you shall be subject to the terms and conditions contained in this document (or amendments that we may communicate to you in writing) unless otherwise agreed in writing in advance by BOTH parties. Complimentary Policy: groups utilizing a minimum of 15 paying, 16th person in a twin will be on a complimentary basis We regret that we cannot accept personal cheques unless cleared through our accounts system before arrival of the clients.

In the event that full payment is not received within the specified time, Royal Mara may at its discretion terminate this agreement forthwith and thereafter shall have no obligation to provide service(s) to the clients. Please note however, that we will invoice the client for conservancy fees which is payable per night. Not more that three (3) single rooms can be held per block booking or group booking. Four (4) singles and above will be charged at double room rate Tour leaders or guides will be charged USD 150 and they will be accommodated in guide accommodation however subject to availability guest tents may be provided at the discretion of Royal Mara if such space is available. Children between 3 and 11 years will pay 75% on the Ground Package rate. Children under the age of 3 years sharing a room with an adult will be accommodated on complimentary basis (maximum 2) All vouchers issued and bookings made by you shall be subject to the terms and conditions contained in this document (or amendments that we may communicate to you in writing) unless otherwise agreed in writing in advance by BOTH parties. Complimentary Policy: groups utilizing a minimum of 15 paying, 16th person in a twin will be on a complimentary basis We regret that we cannot accept personal cheques unless cleared through our accounts system before arrival of the clients.
